## Samsung and SK Hynix trades dominate Korean equity market turnover, raising volatility concerns

Duplicate sourcing amplifies the signal that Korean memory-name leverage is drawing broad attention as a systemic concern; the echo across outlets increases the probability this market-structure risk is actively being monitored by risk desks.

- Korean equity market turnover is heavily dominated by Samsung and SK Hynix trading activity.
- Coverage flags the concentration as a source of market volatility.
- Near-duplicate of separately sourced story on the same market-structure dynamic.
- No incremental data beyond the prior headline is available from this outlet.
